title: Repo config file
goal: Add .workflow/khazad.json defaults for agent, parallelism, verification timeout, base branch, handoff behavior, and verification profiles.
acceptance: Repositories can define Khazad-Doom defaults in .workflow/khazad.json.
Run startup applies configured agent, parallelism, verify timeout, and base branch defaults.
Handoff defaults are read without surprising users when --dry-run is used.
must_ask_if: The slice requires changing the JSON-only worker result contract incompatibly.
The implementation would remove existing CLI/daemon commands.
Acceptance criteria conflict with the Khazad-Doom rule: You shall not slop.
